authors.author: Noel Richards
Noel Richards
Nah bei dir will ich sein

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v4 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O, dear God, we ask for your favor, Come and sweep through this place, Oh, we desire You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I just want to be with You be where You are, Dwell in your presence, oh, God, O, I want to walk with You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I will climb this mountain, And I'll step of the shore, And I have chosen to follow, And be by Your side forever more.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Tell me what You want me to do, Lord God, Tell me what You want for my life, It's Yours, oh, God it's Yours.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Do your will, have Your way, Be, Lord Go, d in this place, O, I want Your will to be done.
